Title: Te protegerán mis alas
Writer: José Miguel Núñez, Claudio Crespo, Antonio Cuadri
Actors: Ibrahima Kone, Nacho López, Daniel Ortiz
Plot: A life story of hope and perseverance, centered on faith in people, addressing social issues like immigration near Gibraltar, featuring missionary José Antonio Rodríguez Bejarano's work in Africa.
